ast.target: 用于编辑器上下文菜单和翻译文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: If the online glossary does not support a specific language pair, or if the service does not support online glossaries at all, glossary entries can be applied locally if `Local Glossary` setting is enabled
ast.target: 如果在线术语表不支持特定语言对，或者服务根本不支持在线术语表，只要启用了 `本地术语表` 设置，术语表条目可以在本地应用
